plan.context:
Drift catalog (11 verified):
[A] Port mismatch. README prints "http://localhost:6970". Server binds 6971 (apps/server/src/index.ts:69, apps/cli/src/commands/server.ts:39, apps/cli/src/server-http.ts:26). Dashboard vite dev binds 5173 (apps/dashboard/vite.config.ts:31).
[B] CLI command drift. README shows `cognit observation add "..."`. Code registers `cognit observe ""` (apps/cli/src/commands/observation.ts:131).
[C] Concept coverage gap. README lists 7 cognition concepts. Code ships 11 entity states (packages/core/src/state.ts). README omits Theory, Artifact, Edge, Session.
[D] Storage shape underdocumented. packages/db/src/schema/tables.ts declares 11 tables; README lists 7 cognition concepts without distinguishing first-class tables (hypotheses) from event-sourced concepts (Observation/Finding/Experiment/Verification/Conclusion/Decision live in `events`).
[E] Hook producer scripts absent. docs/hooks/{claude-code,codex,opencode,gemini-cli}.md reference `~/.cognit/hooks/*.sh` scripts. No scripts shipped in repo.
[F] Envelope version + shape drift. - docs/hooks/*.md: schema_version "1.0.0", nested actor/source. - packages/wrap/src/index.ts:72,95-96: version "1.1.0", FLAT actor_name/actor_type. - packages/db/src/event-schema.ts:15: CURRENT_VERSION "1.2.0" FLAT. Migration runner registered: PAYLOAD_SCHEMAS_BY_VERSION has v1.0.0, v1.1.0, v1.2.0 keys (event-schema.ts:356-362).
[G] Package surface gaps. - packages/sdk/src/index.ts placeholder only. - apps/cli/package.json no `dev` script (tsx ^4.22.4 present). - apps/server/package.json: `@cognit/verification: workspace:^` typo.
[H] Dashboard nav claim drift. README lists 6 views. Code ships 9 routes (apps/dashboard/src/app/router.tsx:50-58).
[I] Recovery wording drift. README implies dedicated surfaces for "rejected" / "evidence". Code folds into /recovery-center + /timeline + /overview.
[J] Cross-app import fragility. apps/server/src/index.ts:62 imports `findProjectRoot` from `../../../apps/cli/src/paths.js`. Cross-app import; fragile.
[K] Doc references claim drift. README.md:395-402 cites 8 paths; 0 exist. Phase F creates 7; Phase G creates docs/events.md.
plan.scope_control: - No new workspace package. Extend @cognit/core exports with `./paths`. - No new npm dep. tsx already in apps/cli/devDeps. - Phase E forbidden to edit packages/wrap/src/index.ts. - Phase E producers emit v1.1.0 FLAT (current runtime). Phase G bumps producers to v1.2.0 FLAT. - apps/cli/src/paths.ts retained as shim re-exporting @cognit/core/paths. - Every phase edit must satisfy an AC. - Single-PR constraint: phases E + F + G land in single squash-merge PR to eliminate producer-vs-runtime gap window and docs/events.md version drift window. - Process gate: lint + typecheck + test must pass before phase close. - Single rule: any envelope version bump lands with README changelog entry in same commit. No two-version coexistence post-plan.
plan.acceptance: AC1 (A): Every URL in README.md resolves to a port bound in apps/server or apps/dashboard. AC2 (B): Every CLI example in README runs cleanly under `cognit --help`. AC3 (C): README documents all 11 entity states from packages/core/src/state.ts. AC4 (D): README storage section enumerates all 11 tables from packages/db/src/schema/tables.ts and explicitly identifies cognition-related subset (hypotheses, artifacts, edges, snapshots). AC5 (E): Each provider in docs/hooks/*.md has a shipped reference producer in docs/hooks/{provider}/. AC6 (F): One canonical envelope shape at v1.2.0 FLAT exported from @cognit/core. packages/wrap emits v1.2.0 FLAT. docs/hooks/*.md examples show v1.2.0 FLAT. Migration runner registers v1.1.0 -> v1.2.0 (verified by Phase 0 audit). AC7 (G): packages/sdk has typed exports map; re-exports @cognit/core/paths and envelope v1.2.0 types; README marks surface as internal. AC8 (G): apps/cli/package.json has `dev` script (`tsx watch src/index.ts`). AC9 (G): apps/server/package.json uses `workspace:*` for @cognit/verification. AC10 (H+I): README dashboard section matches apps/dashboard/src/app/router.tsx 1:1. AC11 (J): apps/server imports `findProjectRoot` from `@cognit/core/paths`. AC12 (K): Every docs/*.md path cited in README exists. F creates 7 docs (architecture, data-model, hooks, cli, dashboard, configuration, storage). G creates docs/events.md (with v1.2.0 commitment). AC13 (J): @cognit/core/paths is importable via `pnpm exec tsx -e` smoke test; `findProjectRoot` is callable. apps/cli/src/paths.ts retained as shim re-exporting from @cognit/core/paths (no caller breaks).
plan.dependency_graph:
audit -> {A, B, C, D} [parallel batch 1] -> E + F [parallel batch 2] -> G -> H
Batch 1: {A, B, C, D} — README + apps/cli/package.json edits. 4-way parallel. Batch 2: {E, F} — hook producers (v1.1.0) + 7 docs. 2-way parallel. Batch 3: {G} — envelope bump + docs/events.md + shim + SDK + changelog. Batch 4: {H} — import swap + verify.
E + F + G land in single squash-merge PR (single-PR constraint).

phase.name: Audit gate (read-only)
phase.scope: Snapshots (no edits): - Ports bound in apps/server, apps/dashboard. - Commands registered in apps/cli/src/index.ts. - 12 exported interfaces in packages/core/src/state.ts. - 11 tables in packages/db/src/schema/tables.ts. - 9 routes in apps/dashboard/src/app/router.tsx. - Envelope versions + shapes emitted by packages/wrap and cited in docs/hooks/*. - PAYLOAD_SCHEMAS_BY_VERSION keys (must include v1.0.0, v1.1.0, v1.2.0). - Actual `migrate()` function location (NOT the JSDoc reference at event-schema.ts:5). - Verify packages/wrap/src/index.ts L95-96 already emit flat actor_name/actor_type. - Files cited under /docs in README.md (per-path existence table). - apps/cli/devDeps: confirm `tsx` present. - packages/sdk/src/index.ts: enumerate current exports. - apps/cli/src/paths.ts importers: grep all importers of findProjectRoot/cognitDir. - Emit README section line ranges for parallel safety.
phase.deliverable: plans/README-alignment-audit.md (machine-readable file:line evidence + README section line-range table + per-path docs/ existence table + PAYLOAD_SCHEMAS_BY_VERSION table + migrate() function location + wrap flat-shape verification + apps/cli/src/paths importers list).

phase.name: Port + URL truth
phase.scope: - Edit README.md Installation + ports block (lines per Phase 0 audit). - Replace 6970 with 6971. - Grep proof: no README URL remains unbound.

phase.name: CLI command parity + dev script
phase.scope: - Edit README.md Advanced Usage CLI table (lines per Phase 0 audit). - Rename `cognit observation add` -> `cognit observe ""`. - Add `dev` script to apps/cli/package.json: `tsx watch src/index.ts`.

phase.name: Concepts + storage truth
phase.scope: - Edit README.md "What Cognit Stores" section + insert new "Storage" section. - Concepts table: all 11 entity states. - Storage section: events spine; all 11 tables; cognition subset marked.

phase.name: Dashboard nav truth
phase.scope: - Edit README.md Dashboard section. - 6-view list -> 9 routes. - Fold "rejected"/"evidence" promises into Recovery page.

phase.name: Hook producers shipped (v1.1.0 FLAT)
phase.scope: - Ship reference producers under docs/hooks/{claude-code,codex,opencode,gemini-cli}/: - claude-code/cc-post.sh, cc-pre.sh - codex/codex-post.sh - opencode/cognit.ts (TS plugin) - gemini-cli/gemini-hooks.json - Producers emit envelope v1.1.0 FLAT (actor_name/actor_type) — current runtime. - FORBIDDEN: edit packages/wrap/src/index.ts (defer to Phase G). - Update docs/hooks/README.md to point at shipped scripts. - Phase G bumps producer scripts to v1.2.0 FLAT in same PR.
phase.deliverable: AC5 satisfied; v1.1.0 FLAT producers committed.

phase.name: Missing docs created (7 of 8)
phase.scope: - Create 7 docs: - docs/architecture.md (system layout + data flow) - docs/data-model.md (tables, events, reducer) - docs/hooks.md (TOP-LEVEL 1-paragraph overview pointer; distinct from docs/hooks/README.md which holds per-provider producer reference. docs/hooks.md links to docs/hooks/README.md.) - docs/cli.md (commands reference) - docs/dashboard.md (routes + views) - docs/configuration.md (cognit.yaml schema) - docs/storage.md (SQLite layout, .cognit/ directory) - docs/events.md NOT created here (Phase G creates with v1.2.0 commitment). - Each doc must reference real code paths verified by Phase 0 audit. - No new deps. No schema changes.
phase.deliverable: 7 of 8 missing docs committed (docs/events.md deferred to G).
phase.reads_files: packages/db/src/schema/tables.ts, packages/core/src/state.ts, apps/cli/src/index.ts, apps/dashboard/src/app/router.tsx, apps/server/src/index.ts, packages/wrap/src/index.ts
phase.writes_files: docs/architecture.md, docs/data-model.md, docs/hooks.md, docs/cli.md, docs/dashboard.md, docs/configuration.md, docs/storage.md

phase.name: Canonical envelope v1.2.0 + SDK + paths + events doc
phase.scope: - Bump packages/wrap/src/index.ts: WRAP_SCHEMA_VERSION "1.1.0" -> "1.2.0". Confirm flat shape (L95-96 audit-verified). - Bump producer scripts (Phase E deliverables) to emit v1.2.0 FLAT. - Update docs/hooks/{claude-code,codex,opencode,gemini-cli}.md schema_version blocks: v1.1.0 -> v1.2.0 FLAT examples. - Extend packages/core: - New packages/core/src/paths.ts: re-export findProjectRoot + cognitDir + projectPaths from a single source. Phase 0 audit identifies the canonical location; default: extract from apps/cli/src/paths.ts via relative cross-package import (allowed in monorepo) OR move source files. - Update packages/core/src/index.ts barrel. - Update packages/core/package.json exports map: add "./paths". - Update apps/cli/src/paths.ts: become shim that re-exports from `@cognit/core/paths`. No caller breaks. (Phase 0 audit lists all importers.) - Extend packages/sdk: - packages/sdk/src/index.ts: re-export @cognit/core/paths + envelope v1.2.0 types. - packages/sdk/package.json: add typed exports map. - Fix apps/server/package.json: `@cognit/verification` to `workspace:*`. - Create docs/events.md with v1.2.0 FLAT envelope description. - README changelog section (insert before "Documentation" block): "envelope v1.2.0 (flat actor_name/actor_type) — migration from v1.1.0 flat."
phase.deliverable: AC6 + AC7 + AC9 + AC12 (8 of 8 docs) satisfied; envelope bump documented.
phase.reads_files: packages/wrap/src/index.ts, docs/hooks/*.md, docs/hooks/{provider}/* (E output), packages/core/src/index.ts, packages/core/package.json, packages/sdk/src/index.ts, packages/sdk/package.json, apps/server/package.json, apps/cli/src/paths.ts, README.md, apps/cli/src/paths.ts importers (Phase 0 audit)
phase.writes_files: packages/wrap/src/index.ts, docs/hooks/*.md, docs/hooks/{provider}/* (bump to v1.2.0), packages/core/src/paths.ts (new), packages/core/src/index.ts, packages/core/package.json (exports map), apps/cli/src/paths.ts (shim), packages/sdk/src/index.ts, packages/sdk/package.json (exports map), apps/server/package.json, docs/events.md (new), README.md (new changelog section only)

phase.name: Cleanup cross-app import + verify
phase.scope: - apps/server/src/index.ts:62: replace `import from "../../../apps/cli/src/paths.js"` with `import from "@cognit/core/paths"`. - Verify AC13 via `pnpm exec tsx -e "import('@cognit/core/paths').then(m => console.log(typeof m.findProjectRoot))"`. Expect `function`. (tsx resolves workspace TS source; node cannot.) - Re-run Phase 0 audit grep to confirm zero README drift remains. - Run quality gate: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test. - Bead close + checkpoint.
phase.deliverable: AC11 + AC13 verified; quality gate PASS; bead closed; checkpoint written.

plan.parallelism:
Batch 1 (after audit): {A, B, C, D} — 4-way parallel. README + apps/cli/package.json only. Batch 2 (after batch 1): {E, F} — 2-way parallel. Hook producers (v1.1.0) + 7 docs. Batch 3 (after batch 2): {G} alone. Envelope bump + docs/events.md + shim + SDK + changelog. Batch 4 (after batch 3): {H} alone. Import swap + verify.
Single-PR constraint: phases E + F + G MUST land in single squash-merge PR. H lands separately (after G is merged + CI green).
Total wall-clock: 1 audit gate + 3 sequential batch boundaries.
